org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.hardware

Class SRSHub

  • java.lang.Object
    • <any>
      • org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.hardware.SRSHub

  • public class SRSHub
extends <any>
    SRS (Seattle Solvers) Hub - Multi-sensor I2C expansion device for FTC robots.

    The SRSHub is a custom hardware device that provides:

    • 12 Analog/Digital Ports: Configurable as analog inputs (0-3.3V) or digital I/O
    • 6 Encoder Ports: Support for quadrature and PWM encoders
    • 3 I2C Buses: Connect I2C devices like ToF sensors, color sensors, IMUs
    • Bulk Reading: Single I2C transaction reads all sensors efficiently
    • CRC Protection: Data integrity checking for reliable communication

    Supported I2C Devices:

    • VL53L5CX: 4x4 or 8x8 ToF sensor array for distance measurement
    • VL53L0X: Single-point ToF sensor
    • APDS-9151: Color, light, and proximity sensor
    • GoBilda Pinpoint: Odometry computer for local positioning

    Usage Example:

    
 // Create configuration
 SRSHub.Config config = new SRSHub.Config();

 // Configure analog/digital ports
 config.setAnalogDigitalDevice(1, SRSHub.AnalogDigitalDevice.ANALOG);
 config.setAnalogDigitalDevice(2, SRSHub.AnalogDigitalDevice.DIGITAL);

 // Configure encoders
 config.setEncoder(1, SRSHub.Encoder.QUADRATURE);
 config.setEncoder(2, SRSHub.Encoder.PWM);

 // Add I2C devices
 SRSHub.VL53L5CX tofSensor = new SRSHub.VL53L5CX(SRSHub.VL53L5CX.Resolution.GRID_4x4);
 config.addI2CDevice(1, tofSensor);

 // Initialize hub
 SRSHub hub = hardwareMap.get(SRSHub.class, "srsHub");
 hub.init(config);

 // Read data in loop
 hub.update();
 double analogValue = hub.readAnalogDigitalDevice(1);
 SRSHub.PosVel encoder = hub.readEncoder(1);
 SRSHub.VL53L5CX tofData = hub.getI2CDevice(1, SRSHub.VL53L5CX.class);

    I2C Configuration:

    • Default Address: 0x57 (7-bit)
    • Bus Speed: 400kHz (Fast mode)
    • Required Firmware: v1.4.4

    Error Handling:

    The hub includes error detection and recovery:

    • CRC Checking: All bulk reads include CRC-16 validation
    • Disconnection Detection: Monitor disconnected() status
    • Device Status: I2C devices report disconnection individually
    See Also:
    SRSHub.Config, SRSHub.VL53L5CX, SRSHub.GoBildaPinpoint

    • Method Detail

      • doInitialize

        protected boolean doInitialize()

      • getManufacturer

        public Manufacturer getManufacturer()

      • getDeviceName

        public java.lang.String getDeviceName()

      • verifyInitialization

        private void verifyInitialization()

      • throwException

        private static void throwException(java.lang.Class<? extends java.lang.Exception> exception,
                                   java.lang.String message)

      • computeCRC16

        private int computeCRC16(byte[] data)

      • init

        public void init(SRSHub.Config config)
        passes the configuration to the SRSHub
        Parameters:
        config - the configuration details that will be passed to the SRSHub

      • update

        public void update()
        bulk-reads data from the SRSHub as specified in the configuration
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the SRSHub has not yet been initialized
        java.lang.RuntimeException - if the SRSHub is unable to update according to the provided configuration

      • ready

        public boolean ready()
        Returns:
        whether the SRSHub is done initializing

      • disconnected

        public boolean disconnected()
        Returns:
        whether the most recent update failed

      • readAnalogDigitalDevice

        public double readAnalogDigitalDevice(int pin)
        gets the current value of the AnalogDigitalDevice at the specified pin
        Parameters:
        pin - the pin being read, from 1 to 12
        Returns:
        the current value read from the AnalogDigitalDevice; from 0 to 1 for analog devices and 0 or 1 for digital devices
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the pin is not between 1 and 12, inclusive
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the SRSHub has not yet been initialized
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the pin was not configured

      • readEncoder

        public SRSHub.PosVel readEncoder(int port)
        gets the current position and velocity of the encoder at the specified port
        Parameters:
        port - the port being read, from 1 to 6
        Returns:
        the current position and velocity of the encoder; for quadrature encoders this is in ticks/ticks per second; for PWM encoders this is in pulse width (microseconds/microseconds per second)
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the port is not between 1 and 6, inclusive
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the SRSHub has not yet been initialized
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the port was not configured

      • getI2CDevice

        public <T extends SRSHub.I2CDevice> T getI2CDevice(int bus,
                                                   java.lang.Class<T> deviceClass)
        gets the current value(s) read from the specified I2C device at the specified bus
        Parameters:
        bus - the bus from which the device is being read, from 1 to 3
        deviceClass - the type of device being read
        Returns:
        a wrapper for the current value(s) returned by the I2C device
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the bus is not between 1 and 3, inclusive
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the SRSHub has not yet been initialized
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the device was not configured on the bus

      • runCommand

        public void runCommand(SRSHub.Command command)
        runs a command on an I2C device
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the SRSHub has not yet been initialized
